creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
Approved, sort of.

You may want to merge this change into PR ports/177799.  Or, I can apply 
it to v1.1 so it comes with the next maintainer update.

Thanks.

On 04/12/13 02:00, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of ports-mgmt/genplist,
>
> Please note that PR ports/177799 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/177799
>


--
